core_principle: Evidence readiness is not capability readiness.
A static checklist is not customer-facing readiness.
A static checklist is not live runtime readiness.
A static checklist is not execution readiness.
A static checklist is not broker/Binance connectivity.
A static checklist is not permission to mutate runtime or trading state.

security_review_evidence.description: Formal review evidence for security-sensitive capability boundaries.
security_review_evidence.missing_evidence: Formal security review evidence is not provided in Phase 9.4.
security_review_evidence.activation_blocker: Missing security review blocks future non-static gates.
security_review_evidence.non_activation_statement: Static evidence does not activate security-sensitive capability.

privacy_review_evidence.description: Formal review evidence for privacy, data exposure, and user-facing disclosure boundaries.
privacy_review_evidence.missing_evidence: Formal privacy review evidence is not provided in Phase 9.4.
privacy_review_evidence.activation_blocker: Missing privacy review blocks future data exposure gates.
privacy_review_evidence.non_activation_statement: Static evidence does not activate privacy-sensitive capability.

credential_handling_design.description: Design evidence for credential storage, access, rotation, revocation, and audit.
credential_handling_design.missing_evidence: Credential storage, access, rotation, revocation, and audit design is not provided in Phase 9.4.
credential_handling_design.activation_blocker: Missing credential design blocks credential handling.
credential_handling_design.non_activation_statement: Static evidence does not activate credential handling.

read_only_runtime_contract.description: Future contract evidence for live read-only runtime behavior, failure modes, and source arbitration.
read_only_runtime_contract.missing_evidence: Live read-only contract, source arbitration, and failure-mode contract are not provided in Phase 9.4.
read_only_runtime_contract.activation_blocker: Missing live runtime contract blocks live read-only runtime.
read_only_runtime_contract.non_activation_statement: Static evidence does not activate live runtime.

mutation_safety_contract.description: Future contract evidence for mutation safety, rollback, auditability, and operator confirmation.
mutation_safety_contract.missing_evidence: Mutation safety, rollback, audit, and operator confirmation contract is not provided in Phase 9.4.
mutation_safety_contract.activation_blocker: Missing mutation safety blocks runtime mutation.
mutation_safety_contract.non_activation_statement: Static evidence does not activate runtime mutation.

external_integration_contract.description: Future contract evidence for external integration boundaries, error modes, privacy, and security.
external_integration_contract.missing_evidence: External integration contract, error-mode plan, privacy boundary, and security boundary are not provided in Phase 9.4.
external_integration_contract.activation_blocker: Missing integration contract blocks external integration.
external_integration_contract.non_activation_statement: Static evidence does not activate external APIs or integrations.

customer_facing_ux_review.description: Future review evidence for customer-facing UX, support boundary, and privacy display behavior.
customer_facing_ux_review.missing_evidence: Customer-facing UX review, support boundary review, and privacy display review are not provided in Phase 9.4.
customer_facing_ux_review.activation_blocker: Missing UX review blocks customer-facing preview.
customer_facing_ux_review.non_activation_statement: Static evidence does not activate customer-facing readiness.

production_deployment_review.description: Future review evidence for deployment readiness, observability, incident response, and operational ownership.
production_deployment_review.missing_evidence: Production deployment, observability, incident response, and operational ownership review are not provided in Phase 9.4.
production_deployment_review.activation_blocker: Missing production review blocks production deployment.
production_deployment_review.non_activation_statement: Static evidence does not activate production deployment.

rollback_plan.description: Future evidence for tested recovery steps, rollback strategy, ownership, and failure containment.
rollback_plan.missing_evidence: Rollback strategy, tested recovery steps, and owner map are not provided in Phase 9.4.
rollback_plan.activation_blocker: Missing rollback plan blocks risky future gates.
rollback_plan.non_activation_statement: Static evidence does not activate reversible runtime change.

audit_log_contract.description: Future contract evidence for audit logs, retention policy, access policy, and review obligations.
audit_log_contract.missing_evidence: Audit log schema, retention policy, access policy, and review obligations are not provided in Phase 9.4.
audit_log_contract.activation_blocker: Missing audit contract blocks live and execution-sensitive gates.
audit_log_contract.non_activation_statement: Static evidence does not activate audit-backed runtime capability.

trading_execution_safety_review.description: Future review evidence for execution safety, zero-fill separation, order review, and stop conditions.
trading_execution_safety_review.missing_evidence: Execution safety, zero-fill separation, order review, and kill switch plan are not provided in Phase 9.4.
trading_execution_safety_review.activation_blocker: Missing trading safety review blocks execution capability.
trading_execution_safety_review.non_activation_statement: Static evidence does not activate trading automation.

source_of_truth_arbitration_review.description: Static evidence that TWOS runtime/product SoT and LDD trading/execution SoT remain separate.
source_of_truth_arbitration_review.missing_evidence: Live arbitration review under real data and account conditions is not provided in Phase 9.4.
source_of_truth_arbitration_review.activation_blocker: Static SoT separation is not enough for live arbitration.
source_of_truth_arbitration_review.non_activation_statement: Static evidence does not mutate or override trading/execution facts.

separation_rules: TWOS runtime/product SoT must never override LDD trading/execution SoT.
LDD trading/execution SoT must never override TWOS runtime/product SoT.
Static evidence packs and future gate checklists must never mutate trading facts, portfolio state, execution ledger state, account state, or cash state.

duxd_queue.queue_item: Execution Ledger Evidence Classifier / Zero-Fill Order Separation Protocol
